docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NELSON, JOSHUA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAINEZ,  REMBERTO $999.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,019.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SAINEZ,  REMBERTO
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAINEZ,  REMBERTO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $999.00 FILED BY NELSON, JOSHUA AS TO DEFENDANT SAINEZ,  REMBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
